title: ammocharis longifolia
intro: Ammocharis longifolia, also known as the African corn lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Amaryllidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ammocharis longifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and digestive issues.
